# Genies

10 capabilities | 36 met / 58 total acceptance criteria

## Capabilities

### [Architect Technical Design](./architect-design.md)
**Status:** active | **ACs:** 4/4 (all met)

The Architect genie creates technical designs within shaped boundaries using Domain-Driven Design, Clean Architecture, and SOLID principles.

### [Crafter TDD Implementation](./crafter-implementation.md)
**Status:** active | **ACs:** 4/4 (all met)

The Crafter genie implements designs with strict test-first discipline combining Kent Beck (TDD, XP, simple design), Martin Fowler (refactoring, clean code), and pragmatic programming.

### [Critic Code Review](./critic-review.md)
**Status:** active | **ACs:** 4/4 (all met)

The Critic genie reviews implementations against acceptance criteria using risk-based evaluation, evidence-based acceptance decisions, and constructive feedback.

### [Designer Genie](./designer.md)
**Status:** active | **ACs:** 12/12 (all met)

The Designer genie is a specialized agent for brand strategy, visual design systems, and AI-assisted asset generation.

### [Deep Reasoning for Analysis Genies](./extended-thinking.md)
**Status:** active | **ACs:** 0/7 (7 pending)

Scout and Architect get domain-specific deep reasoning instructions and model upgrades (Scout: haiku → sonnet) to produce deeper discovery analysis and more thorough technical designs by default, with a `--fast` opt-out flag for speed-sensitive invocations.

### [Multimodal Design Review](./multimodal-design-review.md)
**Status:** active | **ACs:** 0/8 (8 pending)

The multimodal design review capability adds a `/brand:review` command to the Designer genie, enabling vision-model-powered analysis of design artifacts against brand guides and universal UX heuristics.

### [Scout Discovery](./scout-discovery.md)
**Status:** active | **ACs:** 4/4 (all met)

The Scout genie is the discovery specialist combining Teresa Torres' Continuous Discovery Habits, Clayton Christensen & Tony Ulwick's Jobs-to-be-Done framework, evidence-based product thinking, and opportunity mapping.

### [Shaper Problem Framing](./shaper-framing.md)
**Status:** active | **ACs:** 4/4 (all met)

The Shaper genie frames problems into actionable work using Ryan Singer's Shape Up methodology, Teresa Torres, Marty Cagan, and Melissa Perri.

### [Spec-Aware Test Generation](./spec-aware-test-generation.md)
**Status:** active | **ACs:** 0/7 (7 pending)

The spec-aware test generation capability adds a structured spec-to-stub mapping pass to Crafter's TDD RED phase, making AC coverage explicit, traceable, and auditable from the start of the RED phase.

### [Tidier Safe Cleanup](./tidier-cleanup.md)
**Status:** active | **ACs:** 4/4 (all met)

The Tidier genie performs safe, incremental refactoring combining Kent Beck's Tidy First approach, Martin Fowler's refactoring catalog, and Boy Scout Rule.
